gitDiff:
diff --git a/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod b/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
index 3113b98..dc7dfc9 100644
--- a/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
+++ b/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
@@ -205,6 +205,20 @@ Only enable the vector extension:
 
  export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v"
 
+Force the scalar Zbb SHA-256 path for testing or benchmarking:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_zbb"
+ openssl speed -evp sha256
+
+Force the vector SHA-256 path for testing or benchmarking on systems with
+VLEN >= 128 and the required vector crypto extensions:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v_zvkb_zvknha"
+ openssl speed -evp sha256
+
+These overrides are intended for explicit testing. For normal execution on
+Linux, prefer the capabilities detected by the kernel hardware probing support.
+
